zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Kingston於大約1535年出生在英國坎布利其爾可頓哈姆時，她的父親Sir Thomas Kingston12歲，母親Lady Eleanor Kingston11歲。她於1561年與Simeon Coolidge在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1591年在她的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾可頓哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Kingston于大约1535年出生在英国坎布利其爾可頓哈姆时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Kingston12岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Kingston11岁。她于1561年与Simeon Coolidge在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1591年在她的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾可頓哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Kingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England called Kingston or Kingstone. Almost all of them derive from Old English cyning, cing ‘king’ (genitive cyninges, cinges) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have a different etymology, such as Kingston on Soar in Nottinghamshire, which derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Kingston was born about 1535, in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Kingston, was 12 and her mother, Lady Eleanor Kingston, was 11. She married Simeon Coolidge in 1561, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1591, in her hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Kingston est née environ 1535, à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Kingston, avait 12 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Kingston, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Simeon Coolidge en 1561, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1591, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Kingston um 1535 in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Kingston 12 und ihre Mutter Lady Eleanor Kingston 11. Sie hat 1561 in England Simeon Coolidge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1591 im Alter von 58 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Kingston è nata il circa 1535 nel Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Kingston, aveva 12 anni e sua madre, Lady Eleanor Kingston, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Simeon Coolidge nel 1561, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1591, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Kingstonが約1535年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Kingstonは12歳，母Lady Eleanor Kingstonは11歳であった。1561年にイギリスでSimeon Coolidgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1591年に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアコッテンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Kingston(이)가 대략 1535년 영국 캄브리지실르 컷함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Kingston(은)는 12세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Kingston(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1561년 영국에서 Simeon Coolidge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1591년 그녀의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 컷함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Kingston nasceu aproximadamente 1535, em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Kingston, tinha 12 anos e sua mãe, Lady Eleanor Kingston, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Simeon Coolidge em 1561, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1591, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Kingston родилась около 1535 г. в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Kingston было 12 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Kingston, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simeon Coolidge в 1561 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1591 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности коттенам, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Kingston nació aproximadamente 1535, en Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Kingston, tenía 12 años y su mamá, Lady Eleanor Kingston, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Simeon Coolidge en 1561, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1591, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Cottenham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
